commands.command: CButton myButton; myButton.Create(_T("Click Me"), WS_CHILD|WS_VISIBLE, CRect(10,10,100,30), pParentWnd, 1);

commands.command: Project -> Properties -> Configuration Properties -> General -> Platform Toolset -> Visual Studio 2019 (v142)
